subcodes.first_line: The atoms bear witness to God's sovereignty and His power, yet most of mankind remain among the dead [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الذرات لسلطنه الله و اقتداره ولکن الناس اکثرهم من المیتین قد قام اهل
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
